headerDisplay: **Dibby Wemo Manager** – Local Wemo control with DWM scheduling. No Belkin cloud required.

location.title: Location (for sunrise/sunset rules)
location.description: Set your city in the plugin settings panel (click the Settings icon) for accurate sunrise/sunset times. This field is filled in automatically.

discoveryTimeout.title: Discovery Timeout (ms)
discoveryTimeout.description: How long to wait for SSDP discovery responses

pollInterval.title: Device Poll Interval (seconds)
pollInterval.description: How often to poll device state for HomeKit updates

heartbeatInterval.title: Scheduler Heartbeat Interval (seconds)
heartbeatInterval.description: How often the scheduler writes its status heartbeat. Lower values make the status indicator respond faster. Default: 1 second.

manualDevices.title: Manual Devices
manualDevices.description: Add devices that don't respond to SSDP discovery
